name: codex-subagent-guard
description: Guards spawn_agent calls by filling missing routing fields from Codex agent TOML files or rejecting unresolved delegation.

interface.longDescription: Validates spawn_agent tool calls before delegation. When routing fields are missing, it resolves the target subagent from built-in names, ~/.codex/agents, or project .codex/agents TOML files. It fills model and reasoning only when configured, and rejects unresolved calls with a clear hint.
defaultPrompt: Use Subagent Guard to validate spawn_agent routing before delegating.
